text_block_list.text: After I finish up training with Hishi Amazon...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I worked up quite a sweat today! Gotta
make sure tomorrow is just as good... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Something feels off. I guess it won't work if I
just try to do my final sprint all willy-nilly...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger did say that a signature move is all
about good timing...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, but what am I doing wrong? I'm gonna need
some special training to figure this out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Biko is struggling to time her final
sprint properly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, would you mind if I do a little partner
running with her, Teach?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The best way to perfect the timing of your final
sprint is by pacing yourself with someone!
choice_data_list: Sure, go give her a hand.
Let's see if she can figure it out herself first.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's not in me to abandon a hardworking
student in need!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're practicing your final sprint, right? If
you want, we can have a little partner run.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thanks a bunch, Hishiama! Running on my
own wasn't getting me anywhere.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I've got your back! I'll help you out
as much as you need me to.

Hishi Amazon and Biko Pegasus train until the sun
begins to set.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You might be on to something. I guess it's better
to find your own way than havin' someone give
you all the answers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Solving things on your own makes for a good
confidence boost.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll go back to the dorm and whip up a li'l
treat for her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: At the very least, I wanna show my support!
